name: board-replay-lab
description: Local BGA replay capture and conversion tools for ZephyrLabs Gem Table experiments.

scripts.check: node --check scripts/bga-splendor-replay-crawler.mjs && node --check scripts/convert-splendor-capture.mjs && node --check scripts/convert-dinoboard-splendor.mjs && node test/dinoboard-splendor2p-bridge.test.mjs && node test/bga-expansion-compatibility.test.mjs
